channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Oil prices seesaw as Trump sends mixed messages on what’s next in Iran - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Oil prices seesaw as Trump sends mixed messages on what’s next in Iran  The Washington Post
  2. Live updates: Iran’s next supreme leader is named as oil prices soar  CNN
  3. Trump gives mixed messages about when the war with Iran will end  NPR
  4. Iran war may end ‘pretty quickly’: What Trump told Republicans  Al Jazeera
  5. Middle East crisis live: Trump claims Iran war will be over ‘very soon’ but Tehran says it will determine when  The Guardian

item.description:
1. Australia grants asylum to five Iranian women footballers  Al Jazeera

  4. Five Iran Women soccer players defect with help of police following Asian Cup in Australia  Yahoo Sports

item.title: Trump says ‘not happy’ with Iran’s new supreme leader, has replacement in mind - The Times of Israel
item.description:

item.title: Live. Iran's IRGC not to let 'one litre of oil' to leave region as Tehran's attacks continue - Euronews.com
item.description:

item.title: 'Expel US & Israeli ambassadors': IRGC offers 'full freedom' in Strait of Hormuz to Arab, European nations on one condition - WION
item.description:
1. 'Expel US & Israeli ambassadors': IRGC offers 'full freedom' in Strait of Hormuz to Arab, European nations on one condition  WION

item.description:

item.title: US' ‘WTF’ message to Israel after strikes on Tehran leaves 'apocalyptic' scenes | World News - Hindustan Times

item.title: Bahrain declares force majeure as Iran sets its only refinery ablaze - Euronews.com

item.title: Japan prepares for deployment of its first home-developed long-range missile - AP News

item.title: 1 man killed, 2 seriously wounded as Iranian cluster bomb warhead hits central Israel - The Times of Israel
item.description:

item.title: Lebanon asks U.S. for direct peace talks with Israel to end fighting - Axios
item.description:
1. Lebanon asks U.S. for direct peace talks with Israel to end fighting  Axios
  2. War with Iran: Lebanon calls for direct talks with Israel, accuses Hezbollah of betraying country  CNN
  3. Hezbollah’s decision to attack Israel in support of Iran endangers the entire region. Israel has the right to self-defence in line with international law. At the same time, Israel’s heavy-handed response is causing mass displacement and is further destabilising a fr  x.com
  4. Hezbollah trying to 'buy fall of Lebanese state,' Aoun says  The Jerusalem Post
  5. Lebanon’s president warns that Hezbollah could turn country into ‘second Gaza’  The Times of Israel

item.description:
